subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and the servant in attendance hath read it. We have heard, and do answer thee through this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و قرئه العبد الحاضر سمعنا و اجبناک بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power of the Manifestation of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
